# infisical_identities_search (Data Source)

Search Infisical machine identities by name and return matching identity IDs and details.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    infisical = {
      # version = <latest version>
      source = "infisical/infisical"
    }
  }
}

provider "infisical" {
  host = "https://app.infisical.com" # Only required if using self hosted instance of Infisical, default is https://app.infisical.com
  auth = {
    universal = {
      client_id     = "<machine-identity-client-id>"
      client_secret = "<machine-identity-client-secret>"
    }
  }
}

data "infisical_identities_search" "by_name" {
  identity_name = "iac"
  mode          = "contains" # eq | contains
  scope         = "both"     # organization | project | both
}

output "identity_ids" {
  value = data.infisical_identities_search.by_name.identity_ids
}

output "identity_matches" {
  value = data.infisical_identities_search.by_name.identities
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `identity_name` (String) Identity name to search for.

### Optional

- `mode` (String) Name matching mode. Supported values: `eq`, `contains`.
- `scope` (String) Search scope. Supported values: `organization`, `project`, `both`.

### Read-Only

- `identity_ids` (List of String) Matching identity IDs.
- `identities` (List of Objects) Matching identity match objects.
- `total_count` (Number) Total identities matching the filter (as reported by Infisical).

### Nested Schema for `identities`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) Match ID.
- `identity_id` (String) The identity ID.
- `scope` (String) Scope of the identity membership (organization or project).
- `org_id` (String) Organization ID.
- `project_id` (String) Project ID (nullable).
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
- `last_login_auth_method` (String) Last login auth method (nullable).
- `last_login_time` (String) Last login time (nullable).
- `project` (Attributes) Project details (nullable).
  - `id` (String)
  - `name` (String)
  - `slug` (String)
  - `type` (String)
- `roles` (List of Objects) Roles assigned to this identity.
  - `id` (String)
  - `role` (String)
  - `custom_role_id` (String)
  - `custom_role_name` (String)
  - `custom_role_slug` (String)
  - `custom_role_description` (String)
  - `is_temporary` (Boolean)
  - `temporary_mode` (String)
  - `temporary_range` (String)
  - `temporary_access_start_time` (String)
  - `temporary_access_end_time` (String)
- `identity` (Attributes) Identity details.
  - `id` (String)
  - `name` (String)
  - `has_delete_protection` (Boolean)
  - `org_id` (String)
  - `auth_methods` (List of String)
  - `active_lockout_auth_methods` (List of String)
